info.name: SideGurus API
info.description: Complete API collection for SideGurus with authentication, category, location, service, and event moderation endpoints.

item.name: Public Endpoints

request.description: Check if server is running
Public contact-us endpoint. Stores the message as a support ticket and sends the email to shanjid.maktech@gmail.com.

Register a new user account. After registration, you must verify your email with OTP before logging in. Check console logs or server output for OTP in development mode. Phone number is optional. Country and region are required.

exec: console.log('User token saved to collection variables');

request.description: Verify registration with OTP sent to your email. Upon successful verification, you will receive a JWT token and your email will be marked as verified. OTP is valid for 15 minutes.
Resend OTP if you didn't receive it or if it expired. Only works for unverified email addresses. Check console logs for OTP in development mode.

exec: console.log('User token saved to collection variables');

request.description: Login with existing user credentials. Note: Email must be verified before login. Demo account: john.doe@example.com / User@123

exec: console.log('User token saved to collection variables');

request.description: Register with Firebase ID token. Fails if email already exists. On success, backend JWT is saved into userToken.

exec: console.log('User token saved to collection variables');

request.description: Login or register using Firebase ID token. Set {{firebaseIdToken}} from frontend getIdToken() output. On success, backend JWT is saved into userToken.

exec: console.log('Admin token saved to collection variables');

request.description: Login with admin credentials. Demo account: admin@sidegurus.com / Admin@123
Request OTP for password reset. Check console logs for OTP in development mode.
Verify the OTP code sent to email. OTP is valid for 15 minutes.
Reset password using verified OTP. Password must be at least 8 characters.

item.description: Public authentication endpoints that don't require authentication token

item.name: User Endpoints

request.description: Get current logged-in user account settings including full name, email, phone number, country, location, and profile image.
Update account settings using multipart/form-data. Email is read-only. You can update full name, phone number, country, location, and upload a new profile image.
Change password for authenticated user from the account settings screen. Requires current password verification.

item.description: Endpoints for regular users (USER role). Requires user authentication token.

item.name: Admin Endpoints
Account Management

request.description: Get admin account settings information
Update admin account settings using multipart/form-data.
Change password for admin user from the account settings screen.

item.description: Admin profile and account settings management

item.name: Dashboard & Analytics

query.description: Allowed values: thisYear, lastYear, thisMonth, lastMonth, last3Months, last6Months

request.description: Admin dashboard overview API for total users, total listings, total revenue, pending listings, spam reports, and sales performance chart. Supported period values: thisYear, lastYear, thisMonth, lastMonth, last3Months, last6Months.

item.description: Dashboard analytics and reporting endpoints

item.name: User Management

query.description: Optional text search on fullName, email, or phoneNumber
Optional. Allowed values: USER, ADMIN. Default is USER
Optional. Allowed values: createdAt, fullName, email

request.description: Admin user management list API. Returns paginated users with country, region, and activeListingsCount for the user management table.
Admin gets one user by id for the user details or edit screen.
Admin updates a user. Editable fields: fullName, email, phoneNumber, countryId, regionId, role, isEmailVerified.
Admin soft deletes a user. The user account is archived and that user's active listings are also soft deleted and suspended.

item.description: User account management and moderation

item.name: Listing & Content Moderation

query.description: Optional. Filter: PENDING, APPROVED, SUSPENDED, EXPIRED
Optional. Filter by type: SERVICE or EVENT

request.description: Admin dashboard listing management: Get all listings (services and events) with unified filtering. Can filter by status (PENDING/APPROVED/SUSPENDED) and listingType (SERVICE/EVENT). Returns spamReports count for each listing.
Admin views full listing details (service or event)
Admin approves a pending listing (service or event)
Admin suspends a listing (service or event)
Admin soft deletes a listing (service or event)

item.description: Service and event listing management, approval, and moderation

item.name: Category Management
Service Categories

request.description: Admin creates a dedicated SERVICE category using multipart/form-data. Send the category image as a file in the image field.
Update service category. name and image are optional; if image is not sent, current image remains unchanged.
Delete service category by ID.
Admin creates a subcategory under a selected service category. Only name field is required.
Update service subcategory name.
Delete service subcategory.

item.description: Create, update, and delete service categories and subcategories

item.name: Event Categories

request.description: Admin creates a dedicated EVENT category using multipart/form-data. Send the category image as a file in the image field.
Update event category. name and image are optional; if image is not sent, current image remains unchanged.
Delete event category by ID.

item.description: Create, update, and delete event categories
Service and event category management

item.name: Location Management
Countries

request.description: Admin creates a country for listing forms and filters
Admin updates an existing country name
Admin deletes a country

item.description: Manage countries

item.name: Regions

request.description: Admin creates a region inside a selected country
Admin updates a region in a selected country
Admin deletes a region in a selected country

item.description: Manage regions within countries

item.name: Cities

request.description: Admin creates a city inside a selected region
Admin updates a city in a selected region
Admin deletes a city in a selected region

item.description: Manage cities within regions
Countries, regions, and cities management

item.name: Pricing Management

request.description: Admin gets the current system settings including freePeriodDays and promoPeriodDays.
Admin updates the system settings for free and promo tier duration.
Admin creates a pricing plan. Tier must be FREE, PROMO, or REGULAR.
Admin updates a pricing plan
Admin deletes a pricing plan.

item.description: Manage subscription pricing plans and promotional settings.

item.name: Support Management

query.description: Search in name, email, or message (optional)

request.description: Admin retrieves all support tickets with pagination, sorting, and search. Returns paginated list with total count and page metadata.
Admin retrieves a specific support ticket by its ID. Returns ticket details including name, email, message, and timestamps.
Admin deletes a support ticket by its ID. This operation permanently removes the ticket from the database.

item.description: View and manage support tickets from contact form submissions
All admin endpoints organized by function. Requires admin authentication token.

item.name: Category Endpoints
Get All Service Categories With Subcategories

request.description: Public API. Returns all service categories with their nested subcategories. No login required.

item.name: Get Service Category With Subcategories By ID

request.description: Public API. Returns one service category and its subcategories by categoryId. No login required.
Public API. Returns all event categories. No login required.

query.description: Required search text. Example values: health, safari, cleaning

request.description: Search categories by name (case-insensitive). Query param: q=any text keyword.

item.description: Public category endpoints for browsing. Admin management endpoints are in Admin Endpoints > Category Management section.

item.name: Location Endpoints

request.description: Get all countries with their regions and cities nested. Useful for admin location management or preloading hierarchical filter data.
Retrieve all countries for service forms and filters
Retrieve regions for a selected country
Retrieve cities for a selected region

item.description: Public location endpoints for browsing. Admin management endpoints are in Admin Endpoints > Location Management section.

item.name: Pricing Plan Endpoints

request.description: Get all active pricing plans categorized by FREE, PROMO, and REGULAR tiers.
Returns user lifecycle details (freePromoEndsAt, discountPromoEndsAt, isEligibleForFree, isEligibleForDiscount) and active plans with their locked/unlocked state.

item.description: Public pricing plan endpoints for browsing. Admin management endpoints are in Admin Endpoints > Pricing Management section.

item.name: Add Listing Flow
item.description: Step-by-step workflow for user listing creation, pricing selection, payment, and admin moderation. **Note: All admin setup endpoints for categories, locations, and pricing are organized in the Admin Endpoints section. See Admin Endpoints > Category Management, Location Management, and Pricing Management for administration interface.**

item.name: Step 1 - Admin Setup (See Admin Endpoints Section)
⚠️ Moved to Admin Endpoints Section
item.description:
All admin setup operations (categories, locations, pricing plans) are now organized under Admin Endpoints with these sections:

- Admin Endpoints > Category Management > Service Categories
- Admin Endpoints > Category Management > Event Categories
- Admin Endpoints > Location Management > Countries
- Admin Endpoints > Location Management > Regions
- Admin Endpoints > Location Management > Cities
- Admin Endpoints > Pricing Management

This consolidation makes it easier to find and manage all admin operations in one place.

exec: console.log('Service ID saved to collection variables');

formdata.value: Deep interior and exterior cleaning for a spotless vehicle finish.

request.description: Use the response fields data.userLifecycle.isEligibleForFree and isEligibleForDiscount on the frontend to decide which promotional tags/prices to show to the user.

exec: console.log('Checkout session ID saved to collection variables');

request.description: Call this after the user submits the listing and clicks Buy Now in the pricing modal. Redirect the browser to the returned checkoutUrl on the frontend. Evaluates the new 3-tier rules.
For a new listing, successful confirmation keeps the listing in PENDING so admin can review it. Evaluates 3-tier rules.
Use this only for EXPIRED listings. It creates a Stripe checkout session for renewal and the frontend should redirect to checkoutUrl.
Confirm a paid renewal checkout. On success, the expired listing becomes APPROVED again without admin review.
Admin approval publishes the service and starts the 30-day active window. After 30 days the listing becomes EXPIRED automatically.

item.name: Service Endpoints

exec: console.log('Service ID saved to collection variables');

formdata.value: Deep interior and exterior cleaning for a spotless vehicle finish.

request.description: Logged-in user creates a service with multipart form-data. Upload multiple files using the serviceImages field and gallery files using the serviceGallery field. New services always start in PENDING status.

exec: console.log('Checkout session ID saved to collection variables');

request.description: Create a Stripe hosted checkout session for the selected service listing plan and redirect the user to the returned checkoutUrl.
After Stripe redirects back to your frontend success page, send the checkoutSessionId here so the backend can verify payment and move the listing into admin review.
Dedicated renew endpoint for expired listings. Use this when the user clicks the Renew button.
Dedicated renewal confirmation endpoint. Successful payment makes the expired listing live again without admin review.
Public endpoint for the service details page Report Spam button. Increments the spamReports count for the service.

query.description: Optional. Filter by service category id
Optional. Filter by service subcategory id
Optional text search on title and description
Optional preset values: all, under20, from25to100, from100to300, from300to500, from500to1000, from1000to10000, and 500plus (or 500+). Also accepts custom patterns like under50 or from100to450

request.description: Get approved services for the website. Supported query params: categoryId, subCategoryId, countryId, regionId, cityId, search, priceRange, minPrice, maxPrice, sortBy, sortOrder, page, limit. sortBy supports createdAt, price, title. sortOrder supports asc or desc. priceRange supports all, under20, from25to100, from100to300, from300to500, from500to1000, from1000to10000, and 500plus (or 500+), plus custom patterns like under50 or from100to450.

Example filtered services request. Query params supported here are categoryId, subCategoryId, countryId, regionId, cityId, search, priceRange, minPrice, maxPrice, sortBy, sortOrder, page, and limit. Allowed sortBy values: createdAt, price, title. Allowed sortOrder values: asc, desc. Allowed priceRange values: all, under20, from25to100, from100to300, from300to500, from500to1000, from1000to10000, or custom patterns like under50 and from100to450.
Get a single approved service for the public website

query.description: Optional. Filter: PENDING, APPROVED, SUSPENDED, EXPIRED

request.description: Logged-in user sees their own services with status filter (PENDING, APPROVED, SUSPENDED, EXPIRED) and search. Can filter to show expired listings for renewal.
User updates their own service listing
User deletes (soft delete) their own service listing

query.description: Optional. Allowed values: PENDING, APPROVED, SUSPENDED, EXPIRED
Optional. Search in title, description, or user name
Optional. Allowed values: createdAt, price, title

request.description: Admin reviews paid services by moderation status. Returns listings with spamReports count. Supported query params: status, categoryId, subCategoryId, countryId, regionId, search, page, limit, sortBy, sortOrder. Allowed status values: PENDING, APPROVED, SUSPENDED, EXPIRED. Allowed sortBy values: createdAt, price, title. Allowed sortOrder values: asc, desc.
Admin can inspect listings that expired after their 30-day active window. Renewed listings move back to APPROVED automatically after successful payment confirmation.
Admin approves a pending service. This sets the publish date and starts the 30-day active period before the listing becomes EXPIRED.
Admin suspends a service
Admin performs soft delete on a service listing. The listing will be marked as deleted and won't appear in any queries.

item.description: Service creation, moderation, and public website listing endpoints.

item.name: Event Endpoints

exec: console.log('Event ID saved to collection variables');

formdata.value: Elegant evening event with live music, dinner, and curated guest experiences.
Grand Hall, 45 Sunset Avenue, Los Angeles, CA

request.description: Logged-in user creates an event with multipart form-data. Upload multiple files using the eventImages field and gallery files using the eventGallery field. New events always start in PENDING status.

exec: console.log('Checkout session ID saved to collection variables');

request.description: Create a Stripe hosted checkout session for the selected event listing plan and redirect the user to the returned checkoutUrl.
After Stripe redirects back to your frontend success page, send the checkoutSessionId here so the backend can verify payment and move the event into admin review.
Dedicated renew endpoint for expired events. Use this when the user clicks the Renew button.
Dedicated renewal confirmation endpoint. Successful payment makes the expired event live again without admin review.
Public endpoint for the event details page Report Spam button. Increments the spamReports count for the event.

query.description: Optional. Filter by event category id
Optional text search on title and description
Optional preset values: all, under20, from25to100, from100to300, from300to500, from500to1000, from1000to10000, and 500plus (or 500+). Also accepts custom patterns like under50 or from100to450
Allowed values: createdAt, price, title, startDate

request.description: Get approved events for the website. Supported query params: categoryId, countryId, regionId, cityId, search, priceRange, minPrice, maxPrice, sortBy, sortOrder, page, limit. sortBy supports createdAt, price, title, startDate. sortOrder supports asc or desc. priceRange supports all, under20, from25to100, from100to300, from300to500, from500to1000, from1000to10000, and 500plus (or 500+), plus custom patterns like under50 or from100to450.

Example filtered events request. Query params supported here are categoryId, countryId, regionId, cityId, search, priceRange, minPrice, maxPrice, sortBy, sortOrder, page, and limit. Events do not use subCategoryId. Allowed sortBy values: createdAt, price, title, startDate. Allowed sortOrder values: asc, desc. Allowed priceRange values: all, under20, from25to100, from100to300, from300to500, from500to1000, from1000to10000, or 500plus (or 500+), plus custom patterns like under50 and from100to450.
Get a single approved event for the public website

query.description: Optional. Filter: PENDING, APPROVED, SUSPENDED, EXPIRED

request.description: Logged-in user sees their own events with status filter (PENDING, APPROVED, SUSPENDED, EXPIRED) and search. Can filter to show expired events for renewal.
User updates their own event listing
User deletes (soft delete) their own event listing

query.description: Optional. Allowed values: PENDING, APPROVED, SUSPENDED, EXPIRED
Optional. Search in title, description, or user name
Optional. Allowed values: createdAt, price, title, startDate

request.description: Admin reviews paid events by moderation status. Returns listings with spamReports count. Supported query params: status, categoryId, countryId, regionId, search, page, limit, sortBy, sortOrder. Allowed status values: PENDING, APPROVED, SUSPENDED, EXPIRED. Allowed sortBy values: createdAt, price, title, startDate. Allowed sortOrder values: asc, desc.
Admin can inspect events that expired after their 30-day active window. Renewed events move back to APPROVED automatically after successful payment confirmation.
Admin approves a pending event. This sets the publish date and starts the 30-day active period before the event becomes EXPIRED.
Admin suspends an event
Admin performs soft delete on an event listing. The event will be marked as deleted and won't appear in any queries.

item.description: Event creation, moderation, renew, and public website listing endpoints.
